heading: Liability for acts of officials, representatives, and agents
label: 22711 Liability for acts of officials, representatives, and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officials, representatives, and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2271136:67j., .July 23, 1947, ch. 298, § 1161 Stat. 407
